parameters.query:
select r.retroid_id from mes.retroid r
where r.retroid ='{{ $json.body.sn }}'

select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in(39,62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->'data_old'->'uuid'is not null or md.data ->>'uuid' is not null)
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in(50,62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->'data_old'->'screen'is not null or md.data ->>'screen' is not null)
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

nodes.name: 查SN与屏批次号绑定情况

parameters.query:
select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in(31,62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->'data_old'->'battery_id'is not null or md.data ->>'battery_id' is not null)
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

nodes.name: 查SN与电池二维码绑定情况

parameters.query:
select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in(59,62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->'data_old'->'remark'is not null or md.data ->>'remark' is not null)
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1
SELECT * FROM mes.machine_data WHERE retroid_id IN ({{ $json.body.retroid_id }});
